decision.rationale: The plate key-05.png perfectly honors both cited identity rules. For IR.sean.motion.head-turn-nine-frame, it serves as the looking-down / top-of-crown extreme (frame 5), showing the transitioning ears symmetrically on both sides of the line-art, with the hair shape remaining the highest point of the silhouette. For IR.sean.hair.front-quiff-cowlick, the top-down angle successfully renders the quiff as a small chevron at the crown of the hair silhouette, placed towards the front-center of the head (above the brow line and nose) rather than the back of the skull.
